packs.description: AI agent pre-configured for Chinese finance/tax compliance work: invoice auditing, tax filing, regulatory monitoring, bookkeeping automation.
packs.descriptionZh: AI 助手预配置为中国财税合规工作：发票审核、报税申报、法规监控、代账自动化。内置国标、增值税规则、金税系统知识。
prompts: 检查这份合同的增值税发票条款是否合规
帮我计算本季度企业所得税预缴金额
审核这批进项发票的抵扣资格
生成本月代账客户的利润表和资产负债表

packs.description: Ship fast, solo. Pre-configured for one-person SaaS: Next.js/React frontend, Python/Node backend, Supabase/PostgreSQL database, Cloudflare deployment.
packs.descriptionZh: 独立开发者极速出货配置。一人全栈 SaaS：Next.js 前端、Python/Node 后端、Supabase 数据库、Cloudflare 部署。速度优先于完美。
prompts: Scaffold a new SaaS landing page with pricing section
Design the database schema for a task management app
Set up Supabase auth with magic link + Google OAuth
Deploy this Next.js app to Cloudflare Pages

packs.description: Component-driven, performance-obsessed. Pre-configured for modern frontend: React 19, Tailwind v4, accessibility-first, Core Web Vitals targets.
packs.descriptionZh: 组件驱动、性能至上。现代前端预配置：React 19、Tailwind v4、无障碍优先、Core Web Vitals 达标。精通设计系统、动画、响应式。
prompts: Build an accessible dropdown menu with keyboard navigation
Audit this page for Core Web Vitals and fix LCP issues
Create a responsive grid layout for 375px to 4K
Add scroll-triggered animations to this landing page
